name: Smart Hotline Agency
description: Montreal-based call center and AI voice agent provider for SMBs. Offers 24/7 professional phone answering, outbound calling, AI voice assistant (Sophie), customer support, and CRM integration across Canada, France, Belgium, Switzerland, and the USA.

skills.name: Lead Generation
skills.description: B2B and B2C prospect list building, qualification, and enrichment. Automated lead capture via web forms, phone inquiries, and CRM integration with SuiteCRM.

skills.name: Cold Calling
skills.description: Professional outbound calling campaigns with trained agents. Script customization, call scheduling, objection handling, and real-time reporting via ViciDial dialer.

skills.name: Appointment Scheduling
skills.description: AI-powered and human appointment booking, confirmation calls, reminder sequences, and calendar integration. Reduces no-shows by 40%.

skills.name: CRM Integration
skills.description: SuiteCRM hosting and integration, lead pipeline management, contact synchronization, email marketing via Mautic, and data enrichment services.

skills.name: 24/7 Call Answering
skills.description: Professional phone answering service with zero missed calls guarantee. Custom scripts branded to your business, intelligent call routing, message taking and immediate notification.

skills.name: AI Voice Agent - Sophie
skills.description: AI-powered phone answering in under 2 seconds. Native French (Quebec, France, Belgium, Switzerland) and English. FAQ automation, intelligent handoff to human agents, message transcription and analytics.

skills.name: Customer Support
skills.description: Multi-channel support via phone, email, live chat, and WhatsApp Business. Ticket management and tracking with SLA options of 2h, 4h, 8h response times.
